chatList.title: Chats
chat.startNewDesc: Select "New chat" to begin a conversation, or choose a chat from the list to continue an existing conversation.
chat.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this chat? This action cannot be undone.
chat.confirmDeleteBulk: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} {{chat/chats}}? This action cannot be undone.
command.greeting: Howdy, How can I help you?
command.placeholder: How can I help you today?
command.suggestion.writePrompt: I'd like to write something. Could you help me get started? Please ask me what kind of content I want to create.
command.suggestion.learnPrompt: I want to learn something new. Please act as a tutor and ask me what topic I'm interested in.
command.suggestion.codePrompt: I have a coding task. Please act as a senior developer and ask me about the programming language and the problem I'm solving.
command.suggestion.lifePrompt: I'd like some advice on life. Please act as a supportive coach and ask me what's on my mind.
command.suggestion.clarasChoicePrompt: Surprise me with something interesting! It could be a fun fact, a short story, or a creative idea.
validation.enterMessage: Please enter a message or attach a file
validation.notConnected: Not connected to server. Please try again.
error.uploadFilesFailed: Failed to upload files. Please try again.
error.customProviderNotFound: Custom provider not found or disabled. Please check your settings.
error.streamIncomplete: Connection was lost during response generation. The message may be incomplete.
error.filesExpired: Warning: Some attached files have expired and are no longer available. Continuing without them.
error.downloadFailed: Failed to download document. Please try again.
guest.signInToContinue: Sign in to continue chatting. Your conversation will be saved.
command.fileUpload: Add files (images, PDF, DOCX, PPTX, etc.)
command.microphoneAccessDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow microphone access to use voice input.
command.microphoneFailed: Failed to start recording. Please check your microphone.
